faqs.question: How is the faculty at Jayamatha Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Jayamatha Engineering College has been rated 2.5 for Faculty as per the Shiksha verified reviews by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, Jayamatha Engineering College has an impressive review rating of 1.75 by 3 students.

faqs.question: What specializations do Jayamatha Engineering College offer in their courses?
faqs.answer: Jayamatha Engineering College is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Jayamatha Engineering College are Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Mechanical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the course as I got a degree to search for government jobs, but still searching.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement opportunity during our final year for our department, and they have arranged for other departments from call centre companies. There is a hall allocated for placement cell, but there is no one to train the students. Some students from other departments got a job from campus, which was arranged for them, in BPO companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good with a very well-built classroom in a nice location. Wi-Fi is available, but you have to get password and ID from the management. The labs are good as trained staff are there from where I learned ProE, Catia and Ansys. The library is there with all books necessary for your studies. I'm a day scholar, so can't tell about the hostel, but friends told the food was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: For having a really good experience in life, please join this college.

review_content.Placements: Usually, about 8-9 core companies were introduced in the placement programme. 99% of students participated in this programme and 95% got placed. The minimum amount of salary offered was 7000 and the maximum amount was 12000. Some companies like Milky Way and Motherson were there.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is at the top level. The college is having a Wi-Fi (24*7), so that students can freely research about their study topics and other work. Well-provided classrooms are available with a good atmosphere. When coming to project labs, the annoying thing is that some of the machines won't work, but they are trying to repair and replace them as quickly as possible. The quality of food available is very bad. Coming to the hostel rooms, they are neat and clean. One speciality is that 2 people are staying in one room, having an attached washroom. When compared to other hostel rooms, this is better A hostel warden is also there along with security.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2009

review_content.Other: Good Infrastructure, transport facility is available all the time, nice location. But in IT and computer science departments no Stuffed peoples are there, extracurricular activities are not available in there, no practical implementation is available in that college, you cannot expect it from senior peoples also, including HOD. But they are maintaining partiality to tamil students and Malayalee students (this happens in all institutes because they charging heavily from malayalee students).

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 571 students were admitted at SVS Group of Institutions, Meerut and 412 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 412 students 144 were placed with median salary of INR 336000 and 101 students opted for higher studies. A total of 695 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at SVS Group of Institutions, Meerutand 554 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 554 students 370 were placed with median salary of INR 450000 and 129 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 108 students were admitted at SVS Group of Institutions, Meerut and 72 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 72 students 34 were placed with median salary of INR 340000. A total of 251 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at SVS Group of Institutions, Meerutand 142 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 142 students 32 were placed with median salary of INR 395000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SVS Group of Institutions, Meerut offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MBA/PGDM and MCA. SVS Group of Institutions, Meerut fee structure ranges between INR 1,00,200 to 2,82,000.

faqs.answer: Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology?

faqs.answer: Vishnu Lakshmi College Of Engineering And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical Engg./Mechatronics/Automobile Engg./Marine Engg./Manufacturing Tech./Aeronautical Engg./Production Engg./Tech./Mechanical and Automation Engg/Industrial Engg/Robotics & Automation. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

review_content.General: The college didn't help us out much in placements. The pool placements in Delhi NCR were held. No such companies visited the campus, and the students with good grades were scheduled interviews in the companies, mostly in Delhi-NCR. The roles offered to students varied from consulting, a mechanical engineer in Bhushan Steel and BPO offers were the maximum. There is no internship as such. The placement cell is there with inadequate experience. It is not useful at all. The students must be self-sufficient in terms to gain experience and knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure but dissatisfied with low placements.

review_content.Placements: The placements are available in this college. The companies like Moon beverages Ghaziabad, Bhushan steel Kolkata and some power solutions etc., visit the college, but the placements were very low in the mechanical branch. 120 students are there in the mechanical department, but only 9 students got placed including me. The highest salary was 2.40 LPA while the lowest was Rs. 96000 per annum. We have to arrange the internship on our own, and all of us got the internship. No stipend was offered to any of us during the internship period. The placement cell in charge was TP Singh, he was effective enough to get placements, but the problem was the low packages are available.
